ab: ti Kuljelje a ngadan na ku kama.
ti Sauniyaw a ngadan na ku kina.
tapuluq anga a ku cavilj tucu.
izua za ku kaka a uqaljay a tjavulung, ti Kapi a ngadan, tapuluq anga saka ita a cavilj nimadju.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kapi，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Kapi, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: tjengelay aken a emave’av/ljemanguy, nu kaljapulavayan, vaik amen a emave’av/ljemanguy a tacekeljan.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: tjengelay aken a kipuqali(kipudrava), maqati amen a maciyuciyur a semenay a emave’av(ljemanguy).
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
